Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.16 — follow-up to #22: the same list-widget Riichi popup also surfaces under state code 6, not just 28, so v0.0.0.15 caught some cases and missed others. Call-prompt detection now falls back to reading the list items whenever the parent-value scan finds no button label, which covers state-6 and state-28 novice-table Riichi/Pass popups under one code path. Adds the MahjongAddon helper so the plugin works on clients that expose the addon as "EmjL" instead of "Emj" (issue #13). Also removes a speculative pointer-deref from /mjauto walknodes that could crash the client when run on the Riichi popup.
